title: First Glass: Plum Splet
overview: Mizusawa Chisato works at a PR firm, and is a calm and cool office lady, at least so her coworkers think, but Chisato has a hidden side to her. When she drinks, she acts extremely cute. One day, a junior at her office named Koharu asks her for help, and invites Chisato to drink, but Chisato turns her down...

title: Tangerine Breeze
overview: As Chisato and Sora are spending a day off at home for the first time in a while, the weather turns bad, and Chisato tries to convince Sora not to go out shopping despite the sad state of their refrigerator...

title: Cinderella
overview: Chisato tries to hang the winged Lemon Man that Koharu gave her from the ceiling at work, but she falls off the stepladder and sprains her ankle.

title: Spritzer
overview: Chisato is too hungry to sleep after watching a cooking show late at night, so Sora sets about cooking for her.

title: Special Banana Cocktail
overview: Chisato swears off liquor and works overtime every day as an important deadline draws near... but the exhaustion and absence of drinking from her routine quickly leads to withdrawal!

title: Bellini
overview: Shiraishi Yui is Chisato's colleague who sees her as a rival. She becomes depressed when Chisato's proposal for a new PR job is approved, so Chisato invites her out for dinner.

title: Irish Coffee
overview: Chisato and Sora are spending Sunday afternoon at home when they come across a horror film on TV that entrances Sora.

title: Egg Sake
overview: One winter day, Chisato is confused when she returns from work and Sora doesn't immediately greet her. She then finds Sora wearing a flu mask...

title: Zoom
overview: Sora sees Chisato off with a hug, telling her that a 30-second hug is enough to make a person feel better. At the office, Chisato sees Yui sighing in exhaustion, so she calls her to the break room...

title: Shandygaff
overview: Chisato receives an April Fool's message from Sora saying, "Help me!" She returns home to find a stuffed animal in an apron on the table, but Sora is nowhere to be found...

title: Rainy Night
overview: Koharu brings Chisato to a bar called "No Rest," telling her that non-alcoholic cocktails can be good, too. When they set foot inside, they find Sora behind the bar, filling in for the sick owner.

title: First Time
overview: Chisato visits the bar "No Rest," where she first met Sora, with Yui and Koharu and drinks only non-alcoholic cocktails in front of them. Then as Sora, who was bartending that evening, starts to walk Chisato home...

title: Frozen Mango Cocktail
overview: It's Friday, and Chisato watches her colleagues go out for drinks after work, her own head already filling with thoughts of alcohol. She's a bit disappointed when she returns home to see Sora's homemade curry and a non-alcoholic yogurt smoothie waiting for her... until Sora pulls up his special menu.
